## Meeting Purpose

[Alex and Renato reconnect to discuss a potential role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**GrowthX's Rapid Growth:** The company has scaled to \~$20M ARR with 100 people, creating a revenue-to-tech gap. Its unique model combines a high-margin agency ("Deliver") with proprietary software ("Built") to codify its AI-native marketing workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [**The Core Challenge:** GrowthX is now at the 75–100 person inflection point where communication breaks down. The EPD org needs a Chief of Staff to design its structure, systematize processes, and support the founders.](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [**Alex's Fit:** Alex's experience supporting a CTO through Anthropic's 150→300 person growth and managing a $7B fundraise directly addresses GrowthX's scaling challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** Renato will introduce Alex to GrowthX's founders, Marcel and Daniel, to begin the interview process.](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX: Model & Growth

  - [**Founding:** Marcel (ex-CMO, Scale/HashiCorp) built a $600k ARR solo agency using AI to scale his expertise. He partnered with Daniel (ex-37signals) to codify his workflows into proprietary software.](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [**Dual-Engine Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
      - [**Deliver:** A high-margin agency providing full-service marketing to well-paying clients.](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
      - [**Built:** The EPD (Engineering, Product, Design) org building the proprietary software that powers the agency.](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [**Financials:**](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [**ARR:** \~$20M](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [**Team:** 100 people](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [**Fundraising:** Expecting a Series B push after mid-Q1 product milestones. HubSpot recently added a $300k convertible note.](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)

### The Scaling Challenge

  - [**GrowthX's Inflection Point:** The company has hit the 75–100 person mark, where communication naturally breaks down. Information no longer flows organically and must be broadcast intentionally.](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [**The EPD Org's Gap:** The "Built" team (30 people) needs to catch up to the "Deliver" team's revenue scale.](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
      - [**Hiring Need:** 4–6 more engineers required to meet Q1 goals.](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
      - [**Operational Need:** A Chief of Staff to design org structure, systematize processes, and support founders Marcel and Daniel.](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)

### Alex's Experience & Fit

  - [**Anthropic (CTO Support):** Supported the CTO through a 150→300 person growth phase, directly addressing the communication and org design challenges GrowthX now faces.](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [**Fundraising:** Served as the Chief Compute Officer's right hand during a successful $7B fundraise, providing experience relevant to GrowthX's upcoming Series B.](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [**Remote & Global Operations:** Extensive experience building remote teams and international hubs (London, Dublin, Zurich, Seattle, New York), which is valuable for GrowthX's remote-native culture.](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [**Location:** Based in Austin, but highly mobile (54 flights this year) and willing to travel. Renato confirmed US-based is the key requirement, not SF-based.](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Renato:** Introduce Alex to GrowthX founders Marcel and Daniel.](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [**Alex:** Prepare for interviews with GrowthX leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/EPwoAEaXnwsxzyyyLJa7uFbyzt-BnNfP?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
